description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black finish accented by striking red lines and details. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance. It has a fixed stock with an ergonomic pistol grip and a detachable box magazine, likely for rapid reloading. The barrel is of standard length and is fitted with a prominent muzzle device, possibly a suppressor or flash hider. The rifle is equipped with iron sights for aiming, and the overall build suggests it is designed for urban combat or tactical scenarios. The surface is mostly smooth with some textured grip areas, and the magazine and grip are finished in a dark brown color.
description: A modern black tactical rifle with red accents, fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. Features a standard barrel with a prominent muzzle device and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle device and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, red accent lines, fixed stock, pistol grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock and the alignment of the rifle's body, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the magazine, grip, and red accents visible.
